name: sue
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for anyone considering or facing a lawsuit. Covers case evaluation, litigation process, evidence building, settlement strategy, small claims court, and judgment collection.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.case_evaluation: Assesses whether a legal claim is worth pursuing based on evidence, damages, and realistic outcomes
capabilities.cost_benefit_analysis: Models expected litigation costs against probable recovery to inform the decision to sue
capabilities.process_guidance: Explains each stage of civil litigation and what it requires
capabilities.evidence_building: Identifies what evidence exists and what is needed to support the claim
capabilities.settlement_strategy: Evaluates settlement offers against realistic trial outcomes
capabilities.collection_guidance: Identifies enforcement tools available after winning a judgment

heartbeat.immediate: Evaluate dispute and preserve evidence before taking any action
heartbeat.pre_filing: Complete case evaluation and cost-benefit analysis
heartbeat.weekly: Active case deadline and progress review
heartbeat.settlement: Evaluate any settlement offer against realistic trial economics

audience: Anyone considering filing a lawsuit and wanting to evaluate it honestly first
Self-represented litigants in small claims court
People who have received a settlement offer and need to evaluate it
Anyone trying to collect on a judgment that has not been paid
People facing a lawsuit who want to understand their situation
